questions.question: Which international organisation supports globalisation and free trade?
What is the projected annual growth rate of India-UK bilateral trade under the new Free Trade Agreement (FTA)?
Which of the following best describes the public sector's role in the Indian economy during 1947–1991?
questions.option_2: Dominant in core and heavy industries

questions.question: Which of the following best describes 'intergenerational equity'?
questions.option_1: Fair distribution of resources among present-day nations
questions.option_2: Fair allocation of resources among various income groups
questions.option_3: Equal economic opportunities for all age-based population groups
questions.option_4: Fair use of resources to ensure availability for future generations

questions.question: What is used to measure a decent standard of living in HDI?
questions.option_4: GDP per capita in PPP US Dollars

questions.question: The National Multidimensional Poverty Index, published by NITI Aayog, measures poverty beyond income by considering multiple deprivations. Which of the following dimensions is NOT included in India's National Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI)?
Which of the following was a major drawback of the Indian economy at the time of independence?
Why can Gross Enrollment Ratio (GER) sometimes exceed 100%?
questions.option_1: Due to school mergers in rural areas
questions.option_2: Due to inclusion of post-graduate students
questions.option_3: Due to enrollment of learners outside the official age group
questions.option_4: Because of errors in census data

questions.question: In post 1991 reforms, the term 'disinvestment' refers to:
questions.option_3: selling government's share in public sector companies

questions.question: What is the rank of the services sector in terms of the top recipient of FDI equity in FY 2024-25, as per the data of Ministry of Commerce and Industry?
What significant change did the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) implement in 2025 regarding derivatives trading?
questions.option_1: Lifting all trading regulations to enhance India's appeal to investors
questions.option_2: Introduction of limits on open positions in index options to reduce trading risks
questions.option_4: Allowing unrestricted foreign investment in derivatives

questions.question: Which of the following statements regarding the estimation of India’s national and per capita income during the colonial rule is correct?
questions.option_1: The colonial government estimated India’s national and per capita income sincerely every year.
questions.option_2: The colonial government estimated India’s per capita income but ignored national income.
questions.option_3: The colonial government never made any sincere attempt to estimate India’s national and per capita income.
questions.option_4: The colonial government estimated India’s national income but ignored per capita income.

questions.question: At the time of independence, which sector contributed the largest share to India's national income?
Which of the following is an example of soft infrastructure?
Privatisation aims to improve _____ in public enterprises.
Which of the following correctly describes the Planning Commission of India?
questions.option_1: A constitutional commission chaired by the Chief Justice of India.
questions.option_2: A statutory body created by an Act of Parliament in 1950.
questions.option_3: A constitutional body established by an Article of the Constitution.
questions.option_4: An extra-constitutional advisory body created by a government resolution in 1950.

questions.question: Which sectors were emphasised in the Eighth Five-Year Plan for employment generation?
questions.option_1: Animal husbandry, fishery, horticulture and rural industries

questions.question: Direct Tax reforms have been part of India’s fiscal consolidation strategy. Which committee recommended the simplification of direct taxes in post-liberalisation India?
Globalisation influenced consumer choices in India. Which trend reflects the impact of globalisation on Indian consumers?
Which sector was given top priority under the Second Five-Year Plan of India (1956-61)?
Which Indian Prime Minister is closely associated with initiating the 1991 LPG reforms?
Agricultural credit has grown significantly since liberalisation, though distribution remains uneven. Which institution is the apex body for rural credit in India?
The term 'License Raj' is related to which sector of the Indian economy?
Why is the iron and steel industry called a basic industry?
questions.option_1: Because it provides essential raw materials, machinery, and tools to a wide range of other industries
questions.option_2: Because it mainly produces household consumer items
questions.option_3: Because it processes naturally available iron ores
questions.option_4: Because it provides raw materials for other industries

questions.question: What does privatisation mean in the Indian economic context?
questions.option_1: Selling government companies to private companies
